description: Encode an ArtVerse userFields v1 metadata payload into the canonical TLV byte stream, returned as base58. Pure-local helper — no node call. The returned 'userData' can be embedded in any Credits transaction (e.g. /Transaction/Pack 'userData', /SmartContract/Deploy 'userData').

response_error_too_large.message: contentCid value is too large (max 65535 bytes)

notes: All fields are optional — empty/missing values are skipped. contentHash is hex on the JSON layer (becomes raw bytes in the TLV). sizeBytes is a uint64 (max 2^64-1). contractAddress is base58. The wire format is documented in the project README under 'UserFields v1 wire format'.
